steps.title: Use the intercept condition
steps.content: At the $y$-intercept, the graph crosses the $y$-axis, so the $x$-coordinate is $0$. Substitute $x=0$ into the equation.

steps.title: Evaluate the expression
steps.content: $$ y=0^2+31=31 $$ The point is $(0,31)$, so the requested coordinate value is found directly. The answer is 31.
